title: Readiness Exceptions
description: Accepted risks with justification and expiry. The scanner respects these but re-flags when they expire.

checkpoint_id.description: ID of the checkpoint being excepted

justification.description: Why this gap is accepted. Be specific.

decision_reference.description: Link to architecture decision record, meeting notes, or approval

accepted_by.description: Identity of the person accepting the risk

expires.description: When this exception expires. Scanner re-flags after this date.
